sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110678" key="fqeiro/brwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φθειρό-βρωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n110678.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lice-eaten,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2274.tlg001:69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hsch.Mil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">69</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
